unmatched_nodes.description: UE starts timer T3510 Type: event
UE stops timer T3511 (if running) Type: event
AMF may initiate 5GMM common procedures Type: state
Decision: Initial registration request accepted? Type: event
AMF starts timer T3550 and enters state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED Type: event
Decision: REGISTRATION ACCEPT contains Network slicing indication IE with new network slicing information? Type: event
Decision: Initial registration request rejected? Type: event
UE takes action based on 5GMM cause in REGISTRATION REJECT Type: state

unmatched_edges.description: UE stops timer T3511 if running Type: trigger
AMF sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT Type: trigger
UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT, resets counter, enters 5GMM-REGISTERED Type: trigger
Network slicing indication IE present Type: condition
UE sends REGISTRATION COMPLETE Type: trigger
Network slicing indication IE not present Type: condition
AMF sends REGISTRATION REJECT Type: trigger
UE takes action based on 5GMM cause and returns to deregistered state Type: trigger
